title: data_out in rtl outputs at same clock cycle as data_out_reg (Flip-Flop issue)

features.name: two_clockeds_always_blocks_same_module
features.description: Code should include a module with two separate clocked always blocks where one block assigns to a register (data_out_reg) and another block assigns to the output (data_out) using the registered value

features.name: latch_sensitivity_list_in_submodule
features.description: Code should include a submodule with a level-sensitive always block using incorrect sensitivity list (en or rst or data_in) that feeds into clocked logic in a parent module

features.name: module_instantiation_chain_with_combinational_output
features.description: Code should include a chain of module instantiations where a submodule outputs a wire that is then connected to a register-based module with clocked always blocks
